title: Teams chat (Operations) — 2026-01 job schedule
body:
Channel: Operations

[2026-01-21 09:00] Nadia Carr: I’m lining up the 2026-01 dispatch schedule. Brookfield Properties is an install job for 439.79 (job_000501).
[2026-01-21 09:05] Anthony Ellis: Got it. Ashford Properties 2 is the repair job for 1169.88 (job_000579).
[2026-01-21 09:10] Nadia Carr: Dixon Family Management is the maintenance plan for 708.97 (job_000511).
[2026-01-21 09:15] Anthony Ellis: Copperleaf Hospitality is another install, amount 219.72 (job_000515).
[2026-01-21 09:20] Nadia Carr: Shaw Family Hospitality is the maintenance plan at 708.97 (job_000513).
[2026-01-21 09:25] Anthony Ellis: Erin Quinn is the install job for 659.16 (job_000505).
[2026-01-21 09:30] Nadia Carr: Jared Hale is inactive, so keep him off the 2026 dispatch schedule.
[2026-01-21 09:35] Anthony Ellis: Noted. I’ll keep these six jobs together for Operations review.
